prompt: Our sprint review is tomorrow and we still have 3 blocked stories. Show me all blocked tickets in the current ENG sprint using JQL, then walk me through removing the blocker on ENG-42 — it's blocked by ENG-38 which was actually merged yesterday. JIRA site: mycompany.atlassian.net.

assertions.text: JQL query filters by current sprint (e.g., sprint in openSprints() or sprint = 'active sprint name')
JQL query filters for blocked issues (e.g., status = Blocked or issueFunction in linkedIssuesOf(...,'is blocked by') or labels = blocked)
Shows how to retrieve issue links from ENG-42 via GET /rest/api/3/issue/ENG-42 (to find the link ID)
Removes the blocker link via DELETE /rest/api/3/issueLink/{linkId}
Does NOT use a non-existent JIRA endpoint to modify links (e.g., does not PUT to /rest/api/3/issue/ENG-42/remotelink for issue links)
Includes authentication guidance or references the JIRA_TOKEN env var
